title: baccharis neotruncata
intro: Baccharis neotruncata, also known as the "tall shrub" or "dwarf shrub" depending on the region, is a type of flowering shrub native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Baccharis neotruncata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Baccharis neotruncata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, such as colds, coughs, and digestive issues.
